## Description
## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] UI/UX Improvement
- [ ] Code Refactoring / Performance optimization

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand WebRTC/Crypto areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new browser console errors.
- [ ] I have tested this cross-network (Mobile Data <-> Wi-Fi) to ensure STUN/TURN relays still function.
